name: progress
title: Progress
description: Labelled progress bar for determinate task completion and indeterminate waits. Built on Base UI Progress with role=progressbar semantics, a value-text pairing for non-color redundancy, and a reduced-motion-safe indeterminate state.
useWhen: Showing determinate task progress (file uploads, imports)
Tracking completion across a multi-step flow or form
Indicating an indeterminate wait whose duration is unknown
avoidWhen: A brief indeterminate wait with no measurable progress (use a Spinner)
Communicating the user's position among discrete steps (use a Step indicator)

keyboard: The progress bar is a status indicator and never takes focus
Determinate bars expose role=progressbar with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-valuetext
Indeterminate bars omit aria-valuenow and set aria-busy so screen readers announce an ongoing, position-less task
The value is paired with visible label/value text so meaning never relies on the fill color alone
The indeterminate sweep is motion-safe only; reduced motion shows a static in-progress fill, never a fake position
